content: can you tell me what is cancer

content.answer: I'm here to help you understand what cancer is. Cancer is a disease where abnormal cells in our body grow and multiply uncontrollably, forming a lump or tumor. In the case of breast cancer, it's when these abnormal cells grow in the breast tissue. It's a serious condition, but with early detection and treatment, many people can recover and live a healthy life. Don't worry, you're not alone, and there are many resources available to support you. Remember, with the right care and treatment, it's possible to manage cancer and live a fulfilling life.

content: I'm here to help you with any questions or concerns you have about breast cancer. It seems like you've been provided with a lot of medical information, and it can be overwhelming. If you have a lump in your breast or are experiencing any symptoms, it's essential to get checked by a doctor.
